title: Epic of Gilgamesh, Tablet X: The Tavern at the Edge of the World
description: Gilgamesh reaches the tavern-keeper Siduri at the edge of the world. She tells him: the life you seek you will never find.
introduction: Gilgamesh reaches the tavern-keeper Siduri at the edge of the world. She tells him: the life you seek you will never find.

translation.original_text: Gilgamesh, where are you wandering? The life you seek you will never find. When the gods created mankind, they allotted death to mankind.
